title: Allow viewers to... view? Like customer overview
excerpt: We have viewers in our team. They should be able to view but not edit/add/delete. However, there is no way to let them view account overview. There are emails and activities in there (and we added some custom content typ…

posts.author: bcat (Bert)
posts.cookedHtml: We have viewers in our team. They should be able to view but not edit/add/delete. However, there is no way to let them view account overview. There are emails and activities in there (and we added some custom content types) that they need to be able to access
